quotes:
"Sometimes the best way to solve your own problems is to help someone else." 
- Uncle Iroh 🍵

"Good times become good memories, but bad times become good lessons." 
- Uncle Iroh 🍵

"It is important to draw wisdom from many different places. If you take it from only one place, it becomes rigid and stale." 
- Uncle Iroh 🍵

"To find light one must be in the dark in order to find wisdom." 
- Uncle Iroh 🍵

"It's not about whether I can or not. I'm gonna do it because I want to." 
- Luffy 👒

"There are things that matter more than power." 
- Luffy 👒
